title: Förvaltaren om jättenoteringen: Väldigt positivt för AI-tåget
summary_md:
# Förvaltaren om jättenoteringen: Väldigt positivt för AI-tåget

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-06-12  
**Market Sentiment**: Positive

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

The episode discusses SpaceX's record-breaking IPO — described as the largest stock-market listing ever — and what it means for the broader AI and space-economy trade, which the guest fund manager (Handelsbanken Global Digital) views very positively. Conversation covers heavy retail interest, Elon Musk's controlling stake, speculation about a future Tesla merger that would create a ~$3,400bn entity, and the difficulty of valuing a loss-making but explosively-growing company whose Starlink unit is the real cash engine. The mood is bullish on AI infrastructure spending while acknowledging the stock will likely be highly volatile.

---

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
